# tags / inline

The **tags** (multi-value) type's `data-view.cell-editor` capability.

Contributes `DataViewSlots.CellEditor({ match: "tags", ... })` — a compact
`TagsEditor`: an open-by-default `InlinePopover` with a free-text add input (Enter
adds an arbitrary tag) and a toggle-chip grid over `field.options` unioned with the
current selection. Toggling chips accumulates a local `string[]`; dismissing the
popover commits it via `onCommitValues` (the multi-value commit channel), or cancels
if unchanged or on Esc.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Tags (multi-value) field type: data-view inline cell editor (multi-select chip popover).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `DataViewSlots.CellEditor` "tags" → `TagsEditor`
  - Uses: `primitives/badge.Badge`, `primitives/css/toggle-chip.ToggleChip`, `primitives/data-view.DataViewSlots`, `primitives/popover.InlinePopover`, `primitives/ui-kit.Input`
